framework.name: Worldpay (Global Payments) has dedicated 'Head of Agentic Commerce'
framework.description: Reshmi Suresh holds the title 'head of agentic commerce at Worldpay, now Global Payments' — indicating a dedicated org function for agent payments at one of the world's largest processors. They're partnering with Mastercard on Verifiable Intent.
framework.raw_quote: said Reshmi Suresh, head of agentic commerce at Worldpay, now Global Payments.

source.title: How Verifiable Intent builds trust in agentic AI commerce - Mastercard
